meaning: 1. to pay (expenses); 2. expenses; 3. (old) to dismiss (an employee)
sentence: 在北京生活，每月的开销不小。
pinyin: Zài Běijīng shēnghuó, měi yuè de kāixiāo bù xiǎo.
english: Living in Beijing, the monthly expenses are quite significant.

sentence: 运动后要及时饮水补充水分。
pinyin: Yùndòng hòu yào jíshí yǐnshuǐ bǔchōng shuǐfèn.
english: After exercising, you should drink water promptly to rehydrate.

sentence: 这部电影讲述了人类与外星生命相遇的故事。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng jiǎngshù le rénlèi yǔ wàixīng shēngmìng xiāngyù de gùshi.
english: This movie tells the story of humans encountering extraterrestrial life.

sentence: 她大学选修了人类学课程，发现很有趣。
pinyin: Tā dàxué xuǎnxiū le rénlèixué kèchéng, fāxiàn hěn yǒuqù.
english: She took an anthropology elective in college and found it very interesting.

sentence: 切洋葱的时候眼睛总是会流泪。
pinyin: Qiē yángcōng de shíhou yǎnjīng zǒng shì huì liú lèi.
english: My eyes always water when cutting onions.
